description.content: Free-text search and lookup endpoints for shows and people.
Search for shows using a fuzzy text query.

response.name: List of show search hits scored by match.

description.content: Return the single best matching show for a query, optionally embedding related data.
Look up a show using a TVRage, TheTVDB, or IMDb identifier.
Search for people (actors, crew) using a fuzzy text query.
Daily and rolling TV and web/streaming schedules.
Return the TV schedule for a country on a given date.

response.name: Array of scheduled episodes.

description.content: Return the web/streaming schedule for a country (or worldwide) on a given date.
Return all future scheduled episodes (large response, cached 24h).
Show metadata, episodes, seasons, cast, crew, images, and aliases.
Paginated index of every show on TVmaze (250 per page).

response.name: Array of shows for the requested page.

description.content: Return a single show, optionally embedding related resources.

response.name: Show record.

description.content: List every episode of a show, optionally including specials.

response.name: Array of episodes.

description.content: Return the specific episode for a show by season and episode number.
Return episodes that aired on a specific date for a show.
Return the list of seasons for a show.
Return the main cast of a show.

response.name: Array of cast entries.

description.content: Return the crew of a show.
Return alternate titles (also-known-as) for a show.
Return image assets associated with a show.
Return alternate episode orderings for a show.
Individual episode details including guest cast and crew.
Return a single episode, optionally embedding related resources.

response.name: Episode record.

description.content: Return the guest cast for an episode.
Return the guest crew for an episode.
Season-level metadata and episode listings.
Return a single season.
Return the episodes of a season.
Person profiles, cast credits, and crew credits.
Paginated index of every person on TVmaze (1000 per page).
Return a single person.
Return show-level cast credits for a person.
Return show-level crew credits for a person.
Return episode-level guest cast credits for a person.
Bulk timestamps useful for incremental sync of shows and people.
Return a map of show IDs to last-updated timestamps for incremental sync.

response.name: Object keyed by show ID with timestamp values.

description.content: Return a map of person IDs to last-updated timestamps for incremental sync.

response.name: Object keyed by person ID with timestamp values.

description.content:
The TVmaze API is a free RESTful API that returns rich television show, episode, season,
cast, crew, and schedule data. The public endpoints require no authentication and are
licensed under CC BY-SA — attribution to tvmaze.com is required. A paid Premium tier
unlocks a separate user-scoped API documented as `tvmaze-premium-openapi.yml`.

Rate limit: at least 20 calls every 10 seconds per IP. HTTP 429 indicates the limit
was exceeded.


Contact Support:
 Name: TVmaze
